examples: It is a layer of guanine crystals which glow at night.
Adenine and guanine are purines and cytosine and thymine are pyrimidines.
Researchers at purdue university used synthetic forms of guanine and cytosine.
The four bases - adenine (A), guanine (G), thymine (T), and cytosine (C) - spell out the genes.
The G-quadruplex seems to form in DNA where guanine exists in substantial quantities.
